e1_sentence: Narrated Abu Salamah:  Muhammad ibn Amr said on the authority of Abu Salamah, and he did not mention  the name of Abu Hurayrah: The Apostle of Allah (peace be upon him) used to  accept presents but not alms (sadaqah)
e2_sentence: He then  said about the pain of which he died: I continued to feel pain from the morsel  which I had eaten at Khaybar
